name: G-4 migrate-rubric: re-running when rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived exists is rejected with exit 2 because the migration is one-time-only
command: mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules: []\n' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && : > root/rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'already migrated' err.txt && echo one_time_only 1>&2
